brand_voice_note: Refined and craft-obsessed, speaking to golfers who value hand-stitched heritage and understated luxury on the course.

concepts.product_title: British Tan with Matte Navy Leather
concepts.primary_text:
Make a confident statement before you even tee off.

Deep navy leather paired with warm British tan stripes, hand-cut and hand-stitched with traditional French seams by an artisan in San Francisco.

Timeless contrast that turns heads on the course. As unique as you.
concepts.headline: Timeless Navy Meets Warm Tan
concepts.why_it_works: The refined contrast is this set's single most desirable outcome, so leading with the feeling of confident, elegant presence fits a heritage-minded golfer.
concepts.visual_direction: The navy and tan headcover on a walnut side table by a clubhouse window with a fairway blurred behind it.

concepts.product_title: Black Ostrich with Pebbled Crimson Leather
concepts.primary_text:
"I get compliments on them every time I'm on the course."

Black ostrich texture with bold crimson leather stripes, hand-cut and hand-stitched to turn heads.

Golfers keep telling us the same thing: the craftsmanship is top-notch.
concepts.headline: The Set People Ask About
concepts.why_it_works: This is the boldest, most eye-catching set in the lineup, so leaning on real course compliments makes the striking design feel proven and desirable.
concepts.visual_direction: The black ostrich and crimson headcover tucked in a golf bag on a practice green with golf balls scattered nearby.

concepts.product_title: Matte Charcoal Croc with Quilted Smooth White Leather
concepts.primary_text:
Every diamond panel is stitched by hand, one at a time.

We embossed deep charcoal leather with a refined croc texture, then framed each quilted diamond in pristine white leather - all hand-sewn in our San Francisco workshop.

Built to Last, Made for You. That is the whole point.
concepts.headline: Hand-Sewn, Diamond by Diamond
concepts.why_it_works: The quilted diamond construction is the product's most labor-intensive feature, so the maker's-hand story lets the craftsmanship justify itself.
concepts.visual_direction: The charcoal croc and white quilted headcover on a workbench beside leather tools mid-craft.
